participants.description: List of user emails in this conversation

last_message_sender.description: Email of the user who sent the last message

unread_count.description: Map of user email to number of unread messages

active_game_id.description: ID of the currently active game in this conversation

is_archived.description: Whether this conversation has been archived

created_at.description: Timestamp when the conversation was created

updated_at.description: Last time the conversation was updated
